name: Possessed Villagers
description: Shadow-corrupted villagers attack with unnatural strength!

killed_possessed_villagers.display_message: The possessed villagers collapse, the shadow corruption leaving their bodies. They were already dead - the cult had turned them into puppets. You whisper a prayer for their souls.

special_rules.description: These enemies are possessed innocents - killing them weighs on the conscience
Possessed enemies may inflict shadow corruption on hit

ambient_description: The prison cells swing open. Inside, you see familiar faces - villagers who disappeared months ago. But their eyes are ringed with darkness, and shadow corruption seeps from their skin. They shamble toward you with unnatural movements, mouths opening in silent screams. The cult has turned them into weapons.
victory_description: As the last possessed villager falls, the shadow corruption dissipates like smoke. Their faces, in death, finally look peaceful. You recognize Thomas Greenfield, the baker's son. Sarah Ironforge, the merchant. All victims of the cult's experiments. You've freed them from their torment, but the cost weighs heavily on your heart.
defeat_description: The possessed villagers' unnatural strength overwhelms you. As consciousness fades, you see cult fanatics approaching to drag the villagers back to their cells. You barely escape with your lives.
